# VoxPresenter — LLM-friendly summary
# https://llmstxt.org

# VoxPresenter

> VoxPresenter is an intelligent voice teleprompter for iPhone and iPad. It listens to your voice in real time and automatically scrolls to the right paragraph — no tapping, no swiping, hands free.

## What it does

- On-device speech recognition (Apple's Speech framework, fully private, works offline)
- Auto-scroll: advances paragraph-by-paragraph as you read aloud
- Manual fallback: tap top/bottom of screen to go back or skip
- Mac Companion app: turns your iPhone into a wireless remote for Keynote, PowerPoint, Google Slides, Canva and any fullscreen app

## Key facts

- Platform: iOS 17+ / iPadOS 17+
- Price: Free with Pro subscription (Pro Lifetime and Pro Annual options)
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6772470530
- Developer: Xavier Larrodé
- Website: https://voxpresenter.com
- Support: xlarrodeapp+voxpresenter@gmail.com
- Privacy policy: https://voxpresenter.com/privacy.html
- Terms of use: https://voxpresenter.com/terms.html

## Mac Companion

Free macOS utility for VoxPresenter users. Download: https://xlarrodeapp.com/voxpresenter/downloads/VoxPresenterRemote-latest.dmg
